---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation you are running into. Ex: "I cannot currently..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. How should it work from the user's perspective?

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have tried.

## Affected Component

- [ ] Collector (import / normalization)
- [ ] Normalized trace schema
- [ ] Viewer (timeline / cost / summary)
- [ ] Viewer server (API)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references that support this request.
